scene: A simple ancient Egyptian mummification scene, a hook by the nose and a brain tossed into a trash basket, flat sandy tan filling the tall frame, big black caps BRAIN IN THE TRASH.
A heart placed carefully on a golden pedestal, preserved and glowing, flat sandy tan filling the tall frame, big black caps HEART KEPT SAFE.
A heart on one side of a scale balanced against a single feather, flat sandy tan filling the tall frame, big black caps WEIGHED WITH CARE.
Stan pointing confusedly back and forth between his head and his heart, flat soft blue filling the tall frame, big black caps WHICH ONE THINKS.
Old phrase fossils BY HEART and HEARTFELT carved into stone, flat brown filling the tall frame, big black caps HIDDEN IN YOUR WORDS.
